counters.description: my personal permaban. counters pretty much all ranged champs with his one gimmicky ability. not today satan
ewwwwwww. goes invisible and then pops out of nowhere, pulls your cute ass into the enemy team and gives his allies bonus gold for killing you. need i say more?

not necesarily a "threat" but when late game comes shes kind of a better version of you. she isn't good in lane but once it gets to mid/late game her utility in teamfights really negates the impact of yours. sure you can  outdamage and maybe kill her,  but shes a better healer and overall enchanter. build full damage against her rather than trying to compete with her heals and shields. your team must focus her and kill her early in teamfights to remove her impact.
a good morg can use her e to negate alot of your crowd control. she also matches your poke and has built in sustain. not super impossible, but annoying for sure.

synergies.description: her slow allows you to proc the root/stun on your e in lane without rylais. the amount of cc this pair is capable of is nutty. definitely sera's best lane partner.
his ability to follow up on your long range cc and damage makes this a strong pair. walmart version of lux ez lane
similar to ezreal, has the range to follow up on your cc from far away.
her ultimate + yours = slay yes mama. that's really what this duo is about. your poke together is good as well and you can proc your root from her e slow.
